description: Per-route First Load JS budgets (gzipped bytes). Fails CI if measured size exceeds budget × (1 + tolerance). See docs/frontend/bundle-size-budget.md.

/shared-games/[id].note: Wave A.4 detail. Baseline 2026-04-29 measured. Aspirational target 45KB documented in docs/frontend/bundle-size-budget.md (out of scope #629; deferred to optimization pass).
